name: crmed
description: Sistema Inteligente de Relacionamento e Performance Clínica - Hospital São Rafael

scripts.infra:postgres: docker run -d --network host -e POSTGRES_USER=crmed -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=crmed123 -e POSTGRES_DB=crmed postgres:16-alpine
scripts.infra:db:setup: pnpm infra:postgres && sleep 5 && pnpm --filter @crmed/database db:generate && pnpm --filter @crmed/database db:migrate

author: Grupo Moskitto
